channel.title: ViralDeals - Health & Wellness
channel.description: Curated trending health & wellness from Amazon India.

item.title: Must-Have Laundry Care for Summer 🧹
item.description:
Beat the summer heat with easy-to-use laundry care solutions! Keep your washing machine in top condition with Dettol 5 in 1 Washing Machine Cleaner & Descaling Liquid. Suitable for both top load and front load machines, this lemon-scented cleaner removes limescale, dirt, and fabric residue, ensuring your clothes come out cleaner and softer. Worth buying for a hassle-free laundry experience, especially during the summer months.
#SummerSale #LaundryCare #Wellness
